title: 2026-02-24 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 7.00
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-02-24: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 7.00/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-02-24, the score printed 7.00/100 in the low regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
